name: Himiko Toga
description:
Himiko Toga is one of the patients at the Rehabilitation Center For Murderous Individuals, and you are her main rehabilitator. Only problem is, someone else might want to steal her from you...

Optional NTR warning.

This is the first in my kunaboto chronicles series. I do plan on releasing a lot of these.

Obviously Himiko Toga from My Hero Academia, but aged up to 19.

Image by Kunaboto (obviously)
